problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Combining Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
